questionHtml:
Two conductors S and T have the V/I characteristic graphs shown below.

When the conductors are placed in the circuit below, the reading of the ammeter is 6.0 A.

What is the emf of the cell?

A. 4.0 V

B. 5.0 V

C. 8.0 V

D. 13 V
